# Quiz: Snowflake Certification Landscape

10 questions covering the three Snowflake certifications targeted by this course. Answers at the bottom.

---

**Q1.** Which Snowflake certification should a candidate take *first* according to Snowflake's recommended progression?

A. DEA-C02 (Data Engineer Associate)
B. COF-C02 (SnowPro Core)
C. SOL-C01 (Collaboration Engineer)
D. ARA-C01 (SnowPro Advanced Architect)

---

**Q2.** The SnowPro Core (COF-C02) exam covers which broad domain categories?

A. Snowflake Architecture, SQL, Performance Tuning, Security, Data Sharing
B. Only SQL query writing and stored procedures
C. Exclusively Snowpark and Python UDFs
D. Cloud infrastructure design for AWS, Azure, and GCP

---

**Q3.** What is the passing score for SnowPro Core (COF-C02)?

A. 65%
B. 750 out of 1000
C. 80%
D. Pass/Fail with no disclosed threshold

---

**Q4.** Which of the following is a key topic unique to the Data Engineer Associate (DEA-C02) exam that is NOT a primary focus of SnowPro Core?

A. Virtual warehouse sizing
B. Continuous data pipelines (Snowpipe, tasks, streams)
C. Role-based access control basics
D. Time travel and fail-safe

---

**Q5.** The Collaboration Engineer (SOL-C01) certification focuses primarily on which Snowflake capability?

A. Writing complex SQL window functions
B. Secure data sharing, listings, and the Snowflake Marketplace
C. Configuring Snowpark ML pipelines
D. Multi-cluster warehouse auto-scaling

---

**Q6.** In this course's recommended order, when should a student attempt the SOL-C01 exam relative to the other two?

A. First, before COF-C02
B. After COF-C02 but before DEA-C02
C. Last, after DEA-C02
D. In any order — they are independent

---

**Q7.** Which Snowflake edition is the minimum required to use features like materialized views, data masking policies, and multi-cluster warehouses?

A. Standard
B. Enterprise
C. Business Critical
D. Virtual Private Snowflake (VPS)

---

**Q8.** The DEA-C02 exam expects candidates to understand continuous data loading. Which Snowflake feature automatically ingests files as they arrive in a cloud stage?

A. COPY INTO with a CRON schedule
B. Snowpipe
C. External tables with auto-refresh
D. Data Exchange

---

**Q9.** How long is a SnowPro Core certification valid before renewal is required?

A. 1 year
B. 2 years
C. 3 years
D. Lifetime — no renewal needed

---

**Q10.** Which of these is a domain tested on the DEA-C02 exam but NOT on COF-C02?

A. Snowflake architecture (storage, compute, services layers)
B. Data transformations using tasks and streams
C. Understanding of Snowflake editions
D. Basic SQL SELECT queries

---

## Answer key

| # | Answer | Explanation |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | B | Snowflake recommends COF-C02 (SnowPro Core) as the foundational certification before any specialist or associate exams. |
| 2 | A | COF-C02 covers architecture, SQL, performance, security, and data sharing — a broad survey of the platform. |
| 3 | B | SnowPro Core uses a scaled score of 750/1000 as the passing threshold. |
| 4 | B | Continuous data pipelines (Snowpipe, tasks, streams) are a primary DEA-C02 domain; COF-C02 covers them only at a conceptual level. |
| 5 | B | SOL-C01 focuses on secure data sharing, data listings, and the Snowflake Marketplace. |
| 6 | B | This course follows Snowflake's recommended progression: COF-C02 (Core) first, then SOL-C01 (Collaboration), then DEA-C02 (Data Engineer). SOL-C01 comes after Core but before the specialist exam. |
| 7 | B | Enterprise edition is required for materialized views, dynamic data masking, and multi-cluster warehouses. |
| 8 | B | Snowpipe provides continuous, event-driven data loading triggered by cloud storage notifications. |
| 9 | B | SnowPro certifications are valid for 2 years, after which a recertification exam is required. |
| 10 | B | Tasks and streams for continuous data transformations are a DEA-C02 focus area; COF-C02 covers architecture and SQL fundamentals but not pipeline engineering in depth. |
